nodes.label: Pezeshkian Neighbor Policy Offer
nodes.summary: President Pezeshkian offered to halt attacks on neighbors, triggering internal backlash from IRGC hardliners.

props.content: President Pezeshkian's offer to halt attacks on neighbors has triggered a significant internal backlash from hardline IRGC factions.

nodes.label: IRGC Hardline Backlash
nodes.summary: Hardline IRGC factions view Pezeshkian's de-escalation offer as a sign of weakness.

props.content: IRGC factions view the move as a sign of weakness following the offer to halt attacks.

nodes.label: Iranian Military Base Damage
nodes.summary: Satellite imagery confirms extensive and precise damage to several Iranian military bases from US-Israel strikes.

props.content: New satellite imagery confirms 'extensive and precise' damage to several Iranian military bases following the latest US-Israel strikes.

nodes.label: Iran Leadership Split
nodes.summary: An internal split within Iran's provisional leadership council increases the risk of rogue IRGC retaliations.

props.content: The internal split within the provisional leadership council increases the risk of 'rogue' IRGC retaliations and further instability.

nodes.label: Trump-Starmer Iran Conflict Dismissal
nodes.summary: President Trump told UK PM Keir Starmer that American help is not needed to resolve the Iran conflict.

props.content: President Trump explicitly told UK PM Keir Starmer that American 'help is not needed' to resolve the Iran conflict.

nodes.label: US-UK Military Coordination Decline
nodes.summary: Public dismissal of the UK's role signals a historic low in US-UK military coordination and diplomatic deference.

props.content: Signals a historic low in US-UK military coordination and diplomatic deference.

nodes.label: US Embassy Baghdad Attack
nodes.summary: The US Embassy in Baghdad was attacked by regional proxies in response to the war on Iran.

props.content: The US Embassy in Baghdad was attacked as regional proxies respond to the escalating war on Iran.

nodes.label: Israeli Lebanon Raid Failure
nodes.summary: An Israeli raid in Lebanon to recover pilot remains failed, leading to dozens of casualties in retaliatory strikes.

props.content: An Israeli raid seeking a missing pilot's remains failed, resulting in dozens of casualties in subsequent retaliatory strikes.

nodes.label: Middle East Conflict Horizontalization
nodes.summary: The Iran conflict is rapidly spreading across Iraq and Lebanon, drawing in local actors.

props.content: The conflict is rapidly horizontalizing across Iraq and Lebanon, drawing in local actors and threatening US diplomatic outposts.

nodes.label: Kharkiv New Missile Strike
nodes.summary: Russia launched a new type of missile at Kharkiv, killing at least 10 people including children.

props.content: Russia launched a 'new type of missile' at Kharkiv, killing at least 10 people, including children.

nodes.label: Russia Exploiting Epic Fury Distraction
nodes.summary: Russia is using the US focus on Iran (Epic Fury) to test new munitions and cement front-line gains in Ukraine.

props.content: Russia is exploiting the 'Epic Fury' distraction to test new munitions and cement front-line gains without the risk of major US diplomatic intervention.

nodes.label: Iran Regime Fall Market
nodes.summary: Prediction market for Iran Regime Fall is at 31.1%, up from 19 cents.

nodes.label: Kristi Noem Cabinet Exit
nodes.summary: Kristi Noem's exit may signal a wider US Cabinet reshuffle as Trump prioritizes wartime leadership.

props.content: Kristi Noem's exit may signal a wider Cabinet reshuffle as Trump prioritizes wartime leadership.

nodes.summary: PLA readiness patrols around Huangyan Dao suggest China is monitoring US carrier group movements.

props.content: PLA readiness patrols around Huangyan Dao suggest Beijing is monitoring US carrier group movements.
